boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

final_answer: Clinical operations at site B-18 under protocol P8.1 with current IRB-approved consent C12 may activate on 2026-06-28 before enrollment. AUTH-BOR-082 provides complete activation authority satisfying STD-BOR-082-P exact-match requirements for site, protocol, consent version, activation date, and consent-status class.
